form.formComment: Gelding by Dirty Work on debut. Won a jump-out at Flemington on April 2. Well educated and a Flemington jump-out winner for a leading stable.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Dirty Work on debut. Won a jump-out at Flemington on April 2. Well educated and a Flemington jump-out winner for a leading stable.

form.formComment: Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at Kerang Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Too Brazen with 59kg at $6. The start before that second last of 9 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1212m, 5 len behind Wild Roses Grow with 58kg at $16. Hard to have on recent performances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted out and bumped Tuscan War.
Raced keenly in the early stages. Hung in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, slow going 2.25 len behind I'm Foxing with 59kg at $3.50. Previously second-up 4th of 10 at Murtoa 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 4 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Wintery carrying 58kg at $6. Runs along and is in good hands.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 600m shifted in. Laid out approaching the winning post.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At long odds at debut, 7th of 9 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1212m, 4.5 len behind Wild Roses Grow carrying 58kg at $41. Last start 8th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1300m, 10 len behind Abby's Crossword with 59kg at $17. Needs to do more.

form.formComment: Was at a huge quote at debut, 4th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind I'm Foxing with 59kg at $81. Promising type who should run well.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 12 at Benalla Mdn-Sw September 26 over 1206m, 18 len behind Hayatake with 57kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign seventh of 11 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw September 7 over 1100m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Poker carrying 57kg at $8. Might be better off following this run.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 12 at Benalla Mdn-Sw September 26 over 1206m, 18 len behind Hayatake with 57kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign seventh of 11 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw September 7 over 1100m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Poker carrying 57kg at $8. Might be better off following this run.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start ran last of 14 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw on September 19 over 1000m, 6 len behind Tres Magnifique carrying 58kg at $14. Returned from break second last of 11 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1200m, 12 len behind Ten Warriors carrying 59kg at $26. Hard to make much of a case for.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third race start. First start ran last of 14 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw on September 19 over 1000m, 6 len behind Tres Magnifique carrying 58kg at $14. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 50m, shifted out under pressure, carrying Raining Fire outwards.
Began awkwardly. Raced four-wide without cover.
Began awkwardly, then bumped and carried outwards by Tres Magnifique.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 55 days. First-up sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 8 at Sale Mdn-Sw on February 1 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Point Moon carrying 59kg at $3.60. Second-up crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 5th of 11 at Werribee Mdn-Sw on February 17 over 1100m, 6 len behind Purple Streak carrying 59kg at $19. He's still got plenty to find.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly before settling at the rear.
At the start, shifted out and bumped.
Near the 75m, eased to avoid the heels of Succaforyou.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when faded in the straight 5th of 8 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on May 25 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Gunado with 57kg at $2.30. Expecting a strong run fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when faded in the straight 5th of 8 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on May 25 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Gunado with 57kg at $2.30. Expecting a strong run fresh.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 9 at Ararat Mdn-Sw on March 3 over 1100m, slow going 1.0 len behind Villa Capitalista with 59kg at $2.50. Second-up 2nd of 11 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1000m, long-neck behind Heidi Dancer carrying 59kg at $5.50. Improver who can get some of the money.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Lining up for just third start. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months in a small field at Yarra Valley 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Our Yonglee carrying 57kg at $3.10. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Kyneton 3yo Mdn-Sw on November 5 over 1203m, on a wet track; 0.9 len behind Asiatic with 56kg at $2.10. Fitter and can improve for a sharp stable.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Star Witness - Sweet Hannaford). She has seven recent trials prior to her debut today. Ran 3rd in a Sandown-Hillside jump-out on March 18. Aided by a nice alley so well worth keeping safe first time out.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 3rd of 8 at Gosford F&M Mdn-Sw on July 10 over 1100m, slow going 3.5 len behind Nazwah with 55.5kg at $7. This is an ideal race to kick off. In a leading barn and looks all set for a bold return.

form.formComment: Last start 10th of 12 at Strathalbyn 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1200m, 6 len behind Maysoonfly with 55kg at $3.20. The run before that 7th of 12 at Murray Bridge 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1000m, 4 len behind Carpe Astra carrying 55kg at $13. Disappointed last start. Can't recommend until she offers some improvement.
